parts.text: Verified 20 persisted ITviec jobs from finalized sandbox output for audit sandbox_run_20260528_115958_8d4bb799.

args.final_goal: Produce an ADK-shaped reference run trace that reaches finalized, promoted, and query-verified 20-job output.
args.immediate_goal: Load project context through runtime skill tools.
initial_plan: Load project and job-listing skills through the runtime toolset.
Load sandbox workflow and ITviec references.
Load the fixed ITviec fixture into the page workspace.
Start a workflow sandbox, inspect repeated cards, write and run an accountable extractor, validate/finalize, promote, and query persisted rows.
Record each tool call and response in ADK actual_invocation JSON format as it happens.
args.task_understanding: Run the deterministic ITviec Hanoi AI Engineer fixture extraction as a Codex/reference-operator workflow using only runtime-exposed ADK tools, while recording every attempted action.

response.immediate_goal: Load project context through runtime skill tools.

active_tasks.next_step: Review the refreshed dashboard in the browser at http://127.0.0.1:8046/adk-eval-dashboard.html?v=tailwind-adk-1#rubrics, then continue any visual refinements or data-detail changes from this worktree.
active_tasks.summary: Tailwind/ADK Web style refresh applied to the AGE-15 dashboard template: added Tailwind browser utility layer for the local static report, tightened the Material-like rail/topbar, improved selected row states, table shells, list controls, focus rings, and status chip styling while preserving source-bound ADK eval parsing.
active_tasks.title: Build ADK Eval Diagnostic Dashboard

current_state.summary: Project-wide snapshot of milestone, blockers, and near-term priorities.
current_state.title: Current State

handoff.next_step: If adding Codex reference scoring, implement an append-only recorder/converter that enforces the Reference Operator Trace Contract before score_continuation_eval.py consumes the JSON.
handoff.summary: Recorded the AGE-26 reference-operator trace contract: Codex/reference runs must be append-only, use only runtime-agent-exposed tools, and serialize as ADK-shaped function_call/function_response events.
handoff.title: Handoff

workflow_contract.agent_role: agent chooses and owns the extraction method
workflow_contract.repair_rule: repair the failing layer if validation/finalization returns concrete errors

conditional_outputs.evidence/index.json: Required when exact evidence chunks are created under evidence/chunks/.
conditional_outputs.output/script_manifest.json: Required when supporting scripts are authored under scratch/ or output/.

extraction_run_json.chosen_strategy: Non-empty description of the extraction method the agent selected.

expected_output.available_fields: Object mapping output field names to availability statuses. Use required_observed when the page evidence exposes the field for each in-scope job; use observed_if_present or not_observed only when that is supported by inspection.
expected_output.description: Object explaining the job count implied by repeated-unit observations and why the saved successful output should contain that count.
expected_output.field_basis: Object mapping every required_observed field to the page evidence signal that made the agent treat the field as available, for example card text, URL attributes, or metadata rows.

extraction_run_json.observations: List page/layout signals used: selectors, repeated units, URL attributes, text neighborhoods, and count basis.

producer_output_plan.note: The runtime supplies this compact contract, but the agent must still decide the extraction method, evidence plan, script plan, and exact output values.

stdout_json.purpose: Compact preflight contract for agent-authored workflow outputs. The agent must use this to write its own producer_output_plan before authoring output/*.py producer scripts or protocol result files.

script_manifest_json.required_when: Any supporting script exists under scratch/ or output/.

validation_json.candidate_count: Integer derived from the current candidates.jobs length, not a fixed example value.
validation_json.checks: Object containing current-run check results such as count_match, required_fields_present, url_shape_valid, evidence_refs_loaded, or schema_shape_valid.

checks.required_fields_present: <no required_observed field is missing or placeholder>

validation_json.not_status_field: Do not use status='valid' or status='success' as a substitute for valid=true.
validation_json.relevant_count: Integer derived from the current run's relevance decision; normally the count of jobs kept in final result for the current extraction.
validation_json.valid: Boolean. Use true only when the generated protocol output satisfies the agent's current evidence-backed checks; use false for needs_review/error outputs.

validation_sequence: write or regenerate accountable outputs from one recorded method
run scripts/sandbox_finalize.py --audit-id <audit_id> only after validation succeeds

audit_metadata.registry: stored in host ADK runtime; not a sandbox_exec path

stdout_json.command_rule: sandbox_exec.py commands run inside Docker with cwd=/workspace. Use page.html, inputs.json, progress.json, and output/... paths. Do not cd into host audit paths.

args:
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import json, re
text = Path('page.html').read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')
print(json.dumps({
  'job_card_class': len(re.findall(r"class=[\"'].*?\bjob-card\b", text)),
  'job_url_attr': len(re.findall(r"data-search--job-selection-job-url-value=", text)),
  'job_title_target': len(re.findall(r"data-search--job-selection-target=[\"']jobTitle[\"']", text)),
}))
PY

stdout_json.message: Command output fit within the context return limit.

expected_output.count_rationale: The listing page exposes 20 repeated job cards and 20 detail URL attributes; each card is one listing.

field_basis.job_url: h3 data-url and job slug/detail attributes
field_basis.location_raw: work mode plus map-pin location text
field_basis.title: jobTitle h3 target

extraction_strategy.count_method: count job-card and detail URL markers in page.html
extraction_strategy.coverage_plan: emit one persisted job per observed card and verify candidate_count=20
extraction_strategy.unit_boundary: one .job-card with job index, slug/detail URL, title, employer, salary/location/tags
